embeds.title: Moderator
embeds.description: You are the **frontline of TSHE moderation**. You keep the server safe and welcoming by enforcing rules consistently, responding to reports, and escalating when needed. When in doubt вЂ” ask, don't assume.

fields.name: рџ“‹ Core Responsibilities
fields.value:
вЂў Monitor public channels in real time
вЂў Enforce rules consistently and fairly
вЂў Issue warnings, mutes, and kicks for violations
вЂў Respond to member reports promptly
вЂў Document all moderation actions in #mod-log
вЂў Escalate serious cases to Head Moderator
вЂў Maintain a welcoming environment for new members

fields.name: рџ› пёЏ How to Issue a Warning
fields.value:
1пёЏвѓЈ Identify the rule violated (e.g. `A1`, `B2`, `C1`)
2пёЏвѓЈ Use the bot command: `/warn @user [rule] [reason]`
3пёЏвѓЈ Post in #mod-log: `username | rule | action taken`
4пёЏвѓЈ If it's their **3rd+ warning**, flag to Head Mod immediately
5пёЏвѓЈ DM the member with a polite explanation if appropriate
6пёЏвѓЈ **Never argue publicly** about warnings with members

fields.name: вљЎ Authority Overview
fields.value:
вЂў Can delete messages and issue verbal warnings
вЂў Can apply timeouts/mutes up to **24 hours**
вЂў Can kick members from the server
вЂў **Cannot issue bans** вЂ” escalate all bans to Head Mod
вЂў Access to member report tickets

fields.name: рџ“¤ Handle Directly
fields.value:
вЂў Spam, toxic behavior, minor rule violations
вЂў Mutes up to 24 hours
вЂў Kicking disruptive members
вЂў Message cleanup and channel management
вЂў Responding to member questions about rules

fields.name: рџљЁ ALWAYS Escalate to Head Moderator
fields.value:
вЂў **Any ban** вЂ” even 1 day. Mods do not ban independently
вЂў Hate speech, doxxing, CSAM, or NSFW content
вЂў Server raids or coordinated attacks
вЂў Cases involving other staff members
вЂў Any situation you are unsure about

**When in doubt, escalate. There is no penalty for asking.**

fields.name: вљ–пёЏ Conduct Standards
fields.value:
вЂў Stay calm and professional, even with difficult members
вЂў Never punish out of personal frustration or bias
вЂў Keep staff discussions confidential
вЂў Be consistent вЂ” same violation = same punishment
вЂў Own your mistakes and inform Head Mod immediately
вЂў You represent TSHE вЂ” your behavior in other servers matters

fields.name: рџ“ћ Escalation Chain
fields.value:
**You в†’ Head Moderator в†’ Administrator в†’ Head Admin**

Don't skip levels unless it's an emergency raid or immediate safety threat.
